title: Infosys appoints Diane Enberg Jurgens and re-appoints Helene Auriol Potier as independent directors
detailed_summary: Infosys approved changes to its Board of Directors, subject to shareholder approval. Diane Enberg Jurgens was appointed as an additional and independent director effective April 22, 2026 for a three-year term from April 22, 2026 to April 21, 2029. Helene Auriol Potier was re-appointed as an independent director for a second five-year term from May 26, 2026 to May 25, 2031. The document states that both directors are not related to any Infosys director, meet independent-director criteria under applicable laws, and are not debarred from holding director office by SEBI or any other such authority.

key_facts.fact: Diane Enberg Jurgens was appointed as an additional and independent director effective April 22, 2026 for a period of 3 (three) years, subject to shareholder approval.
Diane Enberg Jurgens will serve as an Independent Director for the term of three years from April 22, 2026 to April 21, 2029, not liable to retire by rotation.
Helene Auriol Potier was re-appointed as an independent director for the second term of 5 (five) years from May 26, 2026 to May 25, 2031, subject to shareholder approval.
Helene Auriol Potier will serve as an Independent Director for the second term of five years from May 26, 2026 to May 25, 2031, not liable to retire by rotation.
Diane Enberg Jurgens and Helene Auriol Potier have no relationship with any member of the board of directors.

Declarations were obtained that Diane Enberg Jurgens and Helene Auriol Potier are not debarred from holding office of a Director by virtue of any order passed by the Securities and Exchange Board of India or any other such authority.

leadership_changes.role: Additional Director in the category of Non-Executive, Independent Director
